inputConfigurations.targetQuery:
With ethnicity as(
	select a.cust_num as ecn, a.eth_etek_wf_cd as eth_bmg_cd, case when a.first_name is not null and a.middle_name is not null and a.last_name is not null and a.zip <> '00000' and a.zip4 <> '0000' and a.eth_etek_cd not in ('zz','uc','00') then 1 when a.first_name is not null and a.middle_name is null and a.last_name is not null and a.zip <> '00000' and a.zip4 <> '0000' and a.eth_etek_cd not in ('zz','uc','00') then 2 when a.first_name is not null and a.middle_name is not null and a.last_name is not null and a.zip <> '00000' and a.zip4 <> '0000' and a.eth_etek_cd in ('zz','uc','00') then 3 when a.eth_etek_cd not in ('zz','uc','00') then 4 else 5 end as quality_cd, asof_yyyymm, load_dt, gender_etek_cd, lang_etek_cd, e.eth_etek_wf_desc from (
	select cust_num, cust_co_id, eth_etek_cd, gender_etek_cd, lang_etek_cd, first_name, middle_name, last_name, zip, zip4, asof_yyyymm, load_dt from %SRC_DB_cur%.%SRC_TB_1% union select cust_num, cust_co_id, eth_etek_cd, gender_etek_cd, lang_etek_cd, first_name, middle_name, last_name, zip, zip4, asof_yyyymm, load_dt from %SRC_DB_cur%.%SRC_TB_2% ) a join (select eth_etek_cd,eth_etek_wf_cd,eth_etek_wf_desc from %SRC_DB%.bmgeth_ref_eth_cd_curr_etek where eapp_dt_business_effective_date = %EAPP_BUS_EFF_DT% )e on a.eth_etek_cd = e.eth_etek_cd), 

cnfrd as (
 select ecn, eth_bmg_cd, eth_etek_wf_desc, gender_etek_cd, lang_etek_cd, dense_rank() over (partition by ecn order by quality_cd, asof_yyyymm desc, load_dt desc) rnk from ethnicity )
 
 select ecn as ECN, eth_bmg_cd as ETHNC_BMG_CD, eth_etek_wf_desc as ETHNC_ETEK_WF_DESC, gender_etek_cd as GNDR_ETEK_CD, lang_etek_cd as LANG_ETK_CD from cnfrd where rnk = 1
